test.name: Extract from 1850 census via MCP record_search fixture
test.description: Tests extraction when the record comes from an MCP tool response (the most common production path) rather than from prose embedded in the user_message. Exercises the path where record-extraction reads the record_search fixture's response from context.

input.user_message: The record_search tool found this 1850 census household for Patrick Flynn. Extract all the assertions you can.

judge_context: Should extract assertions for every named person in the household, not just Patrick — siblings and the head of household are FAN associates relevant to future research questions
Relationship assertions should be marked `evidence_type: "indirect"` because the 1850 census does not state relationships explicitly (this distinguishes 1850 from 1860, which does)
